queryCards.question: Count patients by risk level.
queryCards.sql: SELECT risk_level, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patients_core GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY patient_count DESC

queryCards.question: Which diabetic patients have an HbA1c above 9 percent?
queryCards.sql: SELECT p.patient_id, p.name, MAX(CAST(l.value AS REAL)) AS latest_hba1c, p.assigned_clinician FROM lab_results l JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) WHERE l.component = 'HbA1c' AND CAST(l.value AS REAL) > 9.0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM patient_conditions c WHERE c.patient_id = p.patient_id AND c.condition_name LIKE '%diabetes%') GROUP BY p.patient_id ORDER BY latest_hba1c DESC LIMIT 15

queryCards.question: Which anticoagulated patients have no recent INR result?
queryCards.sql: SELECT p.patient_id, p.name, p.age, p.risk_level FROM patients_core p JOIN medications m USING (patient_id) WHERE m.status = 'active' AND (m.medication_class LIKE '%anticoagulant%' OR m.medication_class = 'Vitamin K antagonist') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lab_results l WHERE l.patient_id = p.patient_id AND l.component = 'INR' AND l.result_date >= '2026-01-06') GROUP BY p.patient_id ORDER BY p.age DESC LIMIT 15

queryCards.question: Which patients aged 65 and older are missing pneumococcal vaccination?
queryCards.sql: SELECT p.patient_id, p.name, p.age, p.assigned_clinician FROM patients_core p WHERE p.age >= 65 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM immunizations i WHERE i.patient_id = p.patient_id AND i.vaccine_abbreviation IN ('PPSV23', 'PCV13')) ORDER BY p.age DESC LIMIT 20

queryCards.question: Which patients are on 8 or more active medications?
queryCards.sql: SELECT p.patient_id, p.name, COUNT(*) AS active_medications, p.age, p.risk_level FROM medications m JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) WHERE m.status = 'active' GROUP BY p.patient_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8 ORDER BY active_medications DESC LIMIT 15

queryCards.question: Compare uncontrolled hypertension rates by care archetype.
queryCards.sql: SELECT p.care_archetype, ROUND(AVG(v.systolic_bp), 1) AS avg_systolic_bp, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN v.systolic_bp >= 140 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_readings_over_140 FROM vital_signs v JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) GROUP BY p.care_archetype ORDER BY pct_readings_over_140 DESC

queryCards.question: How does appointment no-show rate vary with housing stability?
queryCards.sql: SELECT s.housing_status, COUNT(*) AS past_appointments, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'No-Show' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS no_show_pct FROM appointments a JOIN social_determinants s USING (patient_id) WHERE a.status IN ('Completed', 'Cancelled', 'No-Show', 'Rescheduled') GROUP BY s.housing_status ORDER BY no_show_pct DESC

queryCards.question: Which payers cover the most high-risk patients with open care gaps?
queryCards.sql: SELECT i.coverage_type, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS high_risk_patients_with_gaps FROM insurance_policies i JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) JOIN care_gaps g ON g.patient_id = p.patient_id AND g.status = 'open' WHERE p.risk_level = 'high' AND i.is_primary = 1 GROUP BY i.coverage_type ORDER BY high_risk_patients_with_gaps DESC

queryCards.question: Which medication classes have the lowest adherence scores?
queryCards.sql: SELECT medication_class, ROUND(AVG(adherence_score), 2) AS avg_adherence, COUNT(*) AS medication_count FROM medications WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY medication_class HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_adherence ASC LIMIT 10

queryCards.question: Which comorbidity categories are most common among high-risk patients?
queryCards.sql: SELECT pc.category, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM patient_conditions pc JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) WHERE p.risk_level = 'high' AND pc.is_primary = 0 GROUP BY pc.category ORDER BY condition_count DESC

queryCards.question: Compare average BMI and blood pressure by risk level.
queryCards.sql: SELECT p.risk_level, ROUND(AVG(p.bmi), 1) AS avg_bmi, ROUND(AVG(v.systolic_bp), 1) AS avg_systolic_bp FROM vital_signs v JOIN patients_core p USING (patient_id) GROUP BY p.risk_level ORDER BY avg_systolic_bp DESC

queryCards.question: Which lab components are most often abnormal?
queryCards.sql: SELECT component, COUNT(*) AS abnormal_results FROM lab_results WHERE flag != 'normal' GROUP BY component ORDER BY abnormal_results DESC LIMIT 12

queryCards.question: Show open care gaps by priority and owner.
queryCards.sql: SELECT priority, owner, COUNT(*) AS open_gap_count FROM care_gaps WHERE status IN ('open', 'scheduled', 'deferred') GROUP BY priority, owner ORDER BY open_gap_count DESC LIMIT 12

queryCards.question: How does evidence completeness vary by language?
queryCards.sql: SELECT preferred_language, ROUND(AVG(data_completeness_score), 2) AS avg_completeness, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patients_core GROUP BY preferred_language ORDER BY avg_completeness ASC

queryCards.question: How is the cohort split between synthetic PII and de-identified records?
queryCards.sql: SELECT privacy_class, consent_status, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM patients_core GROUP BY privacy_class, consent_status ORDER BY patient_count DESC

queryCards.question: Which clinicians have the most pending reviews?
queryCards.sql: SELECT assigned_clinician, COUNT(*) AS pending_reviews FROM patients_core WHERE ai_review_status = 'needs_review' GROUP BY assigned_clinician ORDER BY pending_reviews DESC LIMIT 10

queryCards.question: Show average extraction confidence by imaging modality.
queryCards.sql: SELECT i.modality, ROUND(AVG(s.extraction_confidence), 3) AS avg_confidence FROM imaging_studies i JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = i.session_id GROUP BY i.modality ORDER BY avg_confidence DESC

queryCards.question: Show high-risk extraction sessions by year.
queryCards.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', session_date) AS session_year, COUNT(*) AS high_risk_sessions FROM sessions JOIN patients_core USING (patient_id) WHERE risk_level = 'high' GROUP BY session_year ORDER BY session_year

queryCards.question: How many agent audit events exist by pipeline?
queryCards.sql: SELECT agent_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM audit_log GROUP BY agent_name ORDER BY event_count DESC
